name: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises, Inc.
business: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises, Inc. is a globally-focused energy technologies provider offering diversified energy and emissions control solutions, including advanced technologies that utilize coal, natural gas, hydrogen, waste, and biomass to produce energy, environmental solutions, and carbon capture systems. It also provides aftermarket parts, construction, maintenance, and field services for steam generation equipment, serving industrial, electrical utility, municipal, and other customers.

exposures.sentence: Our proven platforms help utilities, data centers, oil and gas, and other industries meet rising demand
Our proven platforms help utilities, data centers, oil and gas, and other industries meet rising demand
Our proven platforms help utilities, data centers, oil and gas, and other industries meet rising demand

We support global energy needs and baseload power demand by providing advanced technologies that utilize coal, natural gas, hydrogen, waste and biomass to produce energy, environmental solutions and carbon capture systems.
We also offer specialized technologies in industrial energy production, including hydrogen and syngas.
Our advanced environmental and decarbonization technologies help to reduce greenhouse gases and other emissions and capture carbon.

catalysts.event: Agreement with Base Electron for four natural gas-fired power plants
catalysts.sentence: Effective February 26, 2026, we entered into an agreement with Base Electron, an IPP backed by Applied Digital, to complete the design and installation of four 300-megawatt natural gas-fired power plants.

catalysts.event: Potential backlog increase to $2.8 billion pending customer authorization
catalysts.sentence: With this project, our backlog would be $2.8 billion in total as the related work scope is authorized and written commitments are received from the customer.
